title: GREENBYTE IS HERE
body: The wait is over - GreenByte is officially live! Your personal digital eco-tracker is here to change the way you think about screen time. Monitor real-time CO₂ emissions from every app, browser, and game running on your PC. Dive into detailed analytics to see your daily, weekly, and monthly impact. Earn GreenTokens for eco-friendly usage patterns and spend them in the GT Shop on exclusive cosmetics, avatars, and badges. Climb the global leaderboard and prove you're the greenest user out there. Connect your Discord to show off your stats, get personalized eco-tips from GreenHelper AI, and customize your profile to stand out. GreenByte runs quietly in the background - lightweight, private, and always watching your carbon footprint so you don't have to. This is just the beginning. Major updates, events, and new features are already in the works. Welcome aboard - let's make the internet a little greener, one byte at a time.
